stubs Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual stubs Directory Reference(3)

NAME

stubs Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file actions.c
Action function stubs for WASM (not needed for mirror mode). file audio.h
Stub audio types for WASM builds (uses Web Audio API instead of PortAudio). file crypto.c
Stub implementations for crypto-related functions in WASM build. file filesystem.c
File operation stubs for WASM. file log.c
Logging utility stubs for WASM. file manpage.c
Manpage resource stubs for WASM (not needed for mirror mode). file mode_defaults.c
Mode-specific default stubs for WASM. file portaudio.h
Stub PortAudio header for WASM builds. file session_log_buffer.h
WASM stub for session log buffer (not used in WASM). file terminal.c
Terminal function stubs for WASM (not needed for mirror mode). file util.c
Utility stubs for WASM/Emscripten (backtrace, localtime). file video.c
Video utility stubs for WASM.

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
